project.name: DataFlow Engine
project.description: A high-performance data processing engine designed for real-time stream processing and batch analytics.

features.name: Stream Processing
features.description: Process data streams in real-time with sub-millisecond latency.

features.name: Batch Analytics
features.description: Run complex analytical queries on large datasets efficiently.

features.name: Auto Scaling
features.description: Automatically scale resources based on workload demand.

features.name: Data Connectors
features.description: Built-in connectors for Kafka, PostgreSQL, S3, and more.

roadmap.title: v3.2 Release
roadmap.description: Add support for Apache Iceberg tables and improved CDC connectors.

roadmap.title: v4.0 Release
roadmap.description: Major architecture overhaul with native Kubernetes operator support.
